subject: [PATCH v6 02/15] mm: rename uffd-wp PTE bit macros to uffd

2026-05-29.patch_summary: This patch renames the macros related to the uffd-wp PTE bit in various architectures, including x86 and arm64, to simply 'uffd' to reflect that it is used for userfaultfd tracking rather than write protection. The rename is purely mechanical and does not change any behavior. This is done in preparation for a second consumer of this bit, which will use it for access-tracking PTEs. The patch updates the macros in several header files across different architectures.
